member.name: M:HOWA.Mobile.ViewModels.OtpViewModel.SetOtpId(System.Int32)
member.summary: Called by the page — sets the OTP id from navigation param.

member.name: M:HOWA.Mobile.ViewModels.OtpViewModel.SetCode(System.String)
member.summary: Called by the page — pre-fills the code field from navigation param.

member.name: P:HOWA.Mobile.Views.OtpPage.OtpId
member.summary: Receives the OtpId from navigation query.

member.name: P:HOWA.Mobile.Views.OtpPage.OtpCode
member.summary: Receives the pre-filled code from navigation query so the attendee sees the 6-digit code already entered — they just tap Confirm.

member.name: T:HOWA.Mobile.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
